caption:
Dubai’s Must-Visit Christmas Market

These 8 BEST Christmas Markets in Dubai are NOW OPEN! ❄️

Find all your gifts, treats, and festive vibes right here.🎁🎅

Here are the must-visit Christmas Markets in Dubai this 2025: 

Christmas Market (Dec 5 - 31)
📍 Madinat Jumeirah

Winter City (Dec 6-31)
📍Expo City 

Christmas Wonderland (Dec 5 - Jan 9)
📍Centara Mirage Beach Resort 

Winter Garden (Nov 1 - Jan 31) 
📍Al Habtoor City

Festival City (Dec 12 - Jan 4)
📍Dubai Festival City Mall

Ski Dubai’s Winter Wonderland (Dec 1-25)
📍Mall of Emirates

Winter District (Dec 13 - 28)
📍Media City Amphitheater

Winter Market (Dev 13 - 28)
📍Jumeirah Emirates Tower Plaza

TAG your festive buddy & SAVE this reel so you don’t miss any Christmas markets happening across Dubai this December!

transcription.text: I don't want a lot for Christmas. There is just one thing I need. And I don't care about those presents. I only need this Christmas tree. I don't need to end my life.
